title: Gherkin and Garlic Bliss Fritters
description: A crispy and flavorful vegetarian snack made with gherkin, garlic, and bliss. Perfect for a quick evening treat.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, mix together gherkin, garlic, bliss, flour, and egg.
2. Add salt and black pepper to taste.
3. Add bread crumbs and mix well.
4. Heat a non-stick pan with 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
5. Drop the mixture by spoonfuls into the pan.
6. Flatten the mixture slightly with a spatula.
7. Cook for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Flip and cook for another 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
